prompt: A cinematic travel photography portrait of a young woman standing at a wooden mountain viewpoint overlooking lush emerald-green valleys and dramatic pointed mountain ridges under a breathtaking sky. The scene is captured during golden hour with intense sunlight breaking through massive fluffy clouds, creating radiant sun rays and atmospheric volumetric lighting across the landscape. The woman has long flowing dark brown hair, wearing black sunglasses, an oversized pastel sage-green t-shirt, olive cargo pants, and a smartwatch, casually leaning against the wooden railing with both arms extended while looking sideways with a calm relaxed expression. The composition is highly scenic and immersive, featuring layered mountain ranges fading into the distance with rich natural textures, tropical greenery, and deep cinematic depth. Vibrant blue sky contrasts with soft white and gray clouds illuminated by warm sunlight. Ultra-realistic travel photography style, HDR lighting, natural skin tones, high detail, realistic shadows, atmospheric perspective, vibrant greens and blues, soft wind movement in hair and clothing, wide-angle composition, professional DSLR quality, cinematic color grading, 3:4 aspect ratio.
